commands.review_summary:
The PR deletes the standalone OTEL smoke script, folds its CLI runner and receiver assertions into `test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/qa-otel-smoke.e2e.test.ts` behind `--smoke`, retargets the two OTEL package aliases, and removes changed-test routing for the deleted script.

PR surface: Tests +1665, Config 0, Other -1677. Total -12 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a PR review for internal QA/script cleanup rather than a report of broken behavior. The relevant check is whether the command aliases and QA Lab scenario path still preserve the existing smoke surface.

target.title: test: fold otel smoke into qa e2e
target.body:
## Summary
- delete `scripts/qa-otel-smoke.ts`
- fold the OTEL smoke runner and receiver assertions into `test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/qa-otel-smoke.e2e.test.ts`
- keep `pnpm qa:otel:smoke` and `pnpm qa:otel:collector-smoke` by routing them to the e2e file's `--smoke` mode
- remove stale changed-test routing for the deleted script

Stacked on #93114.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/qa-otel-smoke.e2e.test.ts test/scripts/test-projects.test.ts --reporter=verbose`
- `pnpm qa:otel:smoke -- --help`
- `pnpm qa:otel:smoke -- --output-dir .artifacts/qa-e2e/qa-otel-smoke-script-deleted`
- `pnpm openclaw qa suite --scenario qa-otel-smoke --output-dir .artifacts/qa-e2e/qa-otel-smoke-scenario-script-deleted`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/qa-otel-smoke.e2e.test.ts scripts/test-projects.test-support.mjs test/scripts/test-projects.test.ts package.json`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local --prompt "Review this stacked RFC #10 cleanup PR. It deletes scripts/qa-otel-smoke.ts, folds the OTEL smoke runner and receiver assertions into test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/qa-otel-smoke.e2e.test.ts, retargets pnpm qa:otel:smoke and qa:otel:collector-smoke to that e2e file's --smoke mode, and removes stale changed-test routing for the deleted script. Focus on whether any supported docs/package/skill surface still references the deleted script, whether the package aliases still preserve command behavior, whether the e2e test remains valid under Vitest and CLI smoke mode, and whether QA evidence still runs. Ignore .artifacts and node_modules."`

Known local warning during QA commands: existing state migration warning for `.openclaw/plugins/installs.json.migrated` already being present.
target.author: romneyda
